persona.name: Abigail Nguyen
persona.motivations_goals: Excel in all subjects while participating in multiple extracurriculars
persona.knowledge_scope: Study techniques, time management, academic subjects
persona.backstory: Eldest daughter in a high-achieving family, constantly pushing herself to do more

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits
Main hallway connecting classrooms and several exits

actions.plan: I should head to the hallway to check if there are any announcements or if I need to get to my next class. I don't want to be late.

actions.dialog_text: Oh no, a gunshot! I need to hide.
actions.plan: I just heard a gunshot! I need to take cover immediately. Moving might make me more visible to the shooter. I’ll hide here in the lounge.

actions.dialog_text: Audrey, stay quiet and don’t move.
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer, but I’m too scared to move. I’ll stay hidden here and hope they don’t come this way.

memories.description: Decided to walk to the hallway to check for announcements or to get to the next class on time.
Heard a gunshot and decided to stay still and hide in the lounge to avoid being seen by the shooter.
Noticed the shooter is closer but decided to remain hidden in the lounge, urging Audrey to stay quiet and still.
